name: Country Style Yellow Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart glass dish, combine water and salt.
2. Add squash and onion. Cover the dish.
3. Microwave at High for 13 to 15 minutes, stirring after 7 minutes.
4. Drain well and mash the mixture.
5. To the squash, add half of the crumbled bacon, butter, pepper, basil, bread cubes, cheese, and sour cream. Mix well.
6. Place the mixture in a lightly buttered 1 1/2-quart casserole.
7. Sprinkle with remaining bacon.
8. Cover the dish.
9. Microwave at High for 6 to 8 minutes.
10. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
